info.title: VTEX Ads API
info.description:
VTEX Ads API enables merchants and marketplace operators to synchronize product catalogs, display ads in the storefront, record ad interactions, among other operations within the VTEX Ads platform.

This API is primarily used by:
- Store developers
- Marketplace operators
- Integration partners
- Advertising platform providers

With this API you can:
- Synchronize product catalog information for advertising
- Track ad impressions, clicks, and views
- Monitor conversion events and campaign performance
- Manage ad inventory and placements

>ℹ️ Learn more about [VTEX Ads](https://help.vtex.com/en/docs/tracks/retail-media).

## Architecture

VTEX Ads is **cookie-less**. Identification and targeting rely on first-party identifiers — `user_id` and `session_id` — rather than third-party cookies, ensuring compliance with modern privacy regulations.

- **`session_id`:** Persistent visitor identifier, required in every ad query and event. It must remain stable for at least 14 days (the default conversion window). For mobile applications, send the device ID as the `session_id` (GAID on Android, IDFA on iOS) so that the session is maintained indefinitely.
- **`user_id`:** Unique customer identifier on the publisher's platform. It must be consistent across web, mobile app, and physical store. Required in conversion events; recommended for impressions, clicks, and views.

## Before you begin

- **Base URLs.** The API is served from three hosts depending on the operation:
    - `https://api-retail-media.newtail.com.br` — Catalog synchronization, Reports, Credit transfer webhook, and SSO.
    - `https://newtail-media.newtail.com.br` — Ad query.
    - `https://events.newtail-media.newtail.com.br` — Ads events notification (impression, click, view, conversion).
- **Authentication.** Catalog synchronization, Reports, and SSO endpoints require the `X-App-Id` and `X-Api-Key` headers. Ad query and ads event notifications are public and do not require authentication. The Credit transfer webhook uses a different scheme: `X-Api-Key` and `X-Secret-Key` (it does not use `X-App-Id`). Contact [our support](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/how-does-vtex-support-work--2eAT5EyOvaLoHdIWDVaxC3) to obtain credentials.
- **Bulk operations.** A maximum of 500 objects per request and 3 simultaneous requests are allowed for catalog and inventory updates.
- **Event URLs.** The event URLs for tracking impressions, clicks, and views must not be constructed manually — always use the URLs returned by `POST` [Get ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/rma/-publisher_id-).
- **Browser-side events.** Use `navigator.sendBeacon()` to fire impression, view, click, and conversion events from the browser. It ensures asynchronous delivery even when the user navigates away or closes the page.
- **PII hashing.** All personally identifiable fields (`email_hashed`, `phone_hashed`, `social_id_hashed`, `first_name_hashed`, `last_name_hashed`) must be hashed with SHA-256 before being sent. Normalize values first (lowercase and trim; phone numbers in E.164 format).
- **Reports export.** Reports return JSON by default. Set `download=true` to receive an XLSX file (capped at 20,000 rows per export).
- **Ad query performance.** Apply a 500-600 ms timeout to ad query calls and prefer persistent HTTP connections (`Connection: keep-alive`).

## Attribution and deduplication

- **Default conversion window:** 14 days from the user's interaction (click for product campaigns; view for banner, video, and sponsored brand campaigns).
- **Conversion idempotency:** Re-sending the same `order_id` within 30 days is ignored.
- **Event deduplication:** For the same user and ad, impressions are deduplicated for 1 minute and clicks for 1 hour.
- **Data latency:** Conversions appear in reports approximately 30 minutes (API integrations) or up to 2 hours (VTEX platform) after the order is placed.

## Index

### Catalog synchronization
- `POST` [Synchronize product information](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/product/bulk/products)
- `POST` [Synchronize inventory information](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/product/bulk/inventories)

### Ads events notification
- `POST` [Track ad impressions](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/beacon/impression/-ad_id-)
- `POST` [Track ad clicks](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/beacon/click/-ad_id-)
- `POST` [Track ad views](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/beacon/view/-ad_id-)
- `POST` [Track conversions](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/beacon/conversion)

### Ads
- `POST` [Get ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/rma/-publisher_id-)

### Reports
- `GET` [Get advertisers report](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/report/v2/advertisers)
- `GET` [Get publishers report](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/report/v2/publishers)
- `GET` [Get network publishers report](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/report/network/publishers)
- `GET` [List campaigns](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/campaign/v2)
- `GET` [Get campaign details](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/campaign/-campaign_id-)
- `GET` [Get advertiser campaigns detailed report](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/report/advertisers/campaigns-detailed)
- `GET` [Get advertiser ads detailed report](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/report/advertisers/ads-detailed)
- `GET` [Get ads performance report](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#get-/ad/results/v2)

### Credit transfer
- `POST` [Notify credit transfer status](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/webhook/marketplace/transfers/-publisher_id-)

### SSO
- `POST` [Generate seller SSO URL](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/sso/marketplace)

| Parameter name | Description | Type |
| - | - | - |
| `X-App-Id` | Publisher App ID for authorization | Authentication header |
| `X-Api-Key` | API Key for authentication | Authentication header |
| `X-Secret-Key` | Secret key paired with `X-Api-Key` for the credit transfer webhook | Authentication header |
| `Content-Type` | Type of the content being sent | Request header |
| `Accept` | HTTP Client Negotiation Accept Header | Request header |

post.description:
Updates the basic product data in the VTEX Ads catalog.

>⚠️ For each batch insert/update, a maximum of 500 objects per request and 3 simultaneous requests are allowed.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

name.example: TechBrand Laptop Model X-15 4GB 256GB SSD 15.6" Display Windows 11 - Gray

image_url.description: URL of the main product image.

gtins.description: Barcode. For Newtail Network, sending the GTIN is mandatory.

tags.description: List of product tags to be used later during ad queries (`POST` [Get ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/rma/-publisher_id-)) to better contextualize the search. Maximum of 10 tags per SKU, maximum of 64 characters per tag. Only works for Product campaigns.

sellers.description: List of sellers who sell that product. Maximum of 64 characters per seller.

example.name: TechBrand Laptop Model X-15 4GB 256GB SSD 15.6" Display Windows 11 - Gray
TechBrand Laptop Model X-15 4GB 256GB SSD 15.6" Display Windows 11 - Gray

messages.description: List of messages from the server.

post.description:
Update inventory information, which defines the price, promotional price, and product availability.

>⚠️ For each batch insert/update, a maximum of 500 objects per request and three simultaneous requests are allowed.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

store_id.description: Store identifier. If store_id is not sent, it will be interpreted that this inventory information will be used for all stores.

promotional_price.description: Promotional price of the product. Use 0 to remove the promotional price.

is_available.description: Indicates if the product is available for sale.

messages.description: List of messages from the server.

post.description:
Track when an ad is rendered or visible to a user. The event URL must not be constructed manually — always use the URL provided from `POST` [Get ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/rma/-publisher_id-).

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user within your platform. It must remain consistent across all user touchpoints and sales channels. Required when `session_id` is not provided.

session_id.description: Persistent visitor identifier. Must remain stable for at least 14 days. For mobile apps, use the device ID (GAID on Android, IDFA on iOS). Required when `user_id` is not provided.

messages.description: List of messages from the server.

post.description:
Track when a user clicks on an ad. The event URL must not be constructed manually — always use the URL provided from `POST` [Get ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/rma/-publisher_id-).

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user within your platform. It must remain consistent across all user touchpoints and sales channels. Required when `session_id` is not provided.

session_id.description: Persistent visitor identifier. Must remain stable for at least 14 days. For mobile apps, use the device ID (GAID on Android, IDFA on iOS). Required when `user_id` is not provided.

messages.description: List of messages from the server.

post.description:
Track views for banner ads. The event URL must not be constructed manually — always use the URL provided from `POST` [Get ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/vtex-ads-api#post-/v1/rma/-publisher_id-).

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user within your platform. It must remain consistent across all user touchpoints and sales channels. Required when `session_id` is not provided.

session_id.description: Persistent visitor identifier. Must remain stable for at least 14 days. For mobile apps, use the device ID (GAID on Android, IDFA on iOS). Required when `user_id` is not provided.

messages.description: List of messages from the server.

post.description:
Track when an ad leads to a purchase. This endpoint is used to notify one or more orders (sending them in a batch).

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

channel.description: Identifies the conversion channel (for example, `ecommerce`, `app`, or `physical_store`).

brand.description: Brand or site where the sale occurred. Required when the publisher operates more than one site.

session_id.description: Identification of the session in which the purchase was made, to help attribute the sale to ads.

items.description: List of items purchased in the order.

price.description: Product 'from' price. Not multiplied by quantity.

promotional_price.description: Product 'for' price (discounted price). Not multiplied by quantity.

product_id.description: Unique product identification that includes the SKU.

created_at.description: Order creation date in ISO 8601 format in UTC (for example, `2026-01-01T09:20:00Z`).

is_company.description: Indicates if the sale was made to an individual or a company.

gender.description: Indicates customer's gender. F: female, M: male, O: other.

uf.description: Indicates the state where the order was made.

city.description: Indicates the name of the city where the customer bought.

social_id_hashed.description: Hashed user identification document, such as social ID, CPF, or CNPJ.

messages.description: List of messages from the server.

post.description:
Retrieve Product and Banner ad formats based on context and placements.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

## Request best practices

- **HTTP persistence:** Prefer persistent connections (`Connection: keep-alive`).
- **Timeout:** Apply a 500-600 ms timeout to the ad query.

## Context-specific fields

The `context` value determines which additional fields are required in the request body. The example below uses the `search` context — adapt it to your context using the table below. Include only the fields listed for your context (in addition to the common required fields `session_id`, `context`, `channel`, and `placements`).

| `context` | Additional required fields | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `home` | None | Use generic placements (top banner, home shelf). |
| `category` | `category_name` | Provide the full breadcrumb path (for example, `Daily Care > Deodorant > Spray`). |
| `search` | `term` | Send the search query. Optionally pass `tags` to scope eligible ads. |
| `product_page` | `product_sku` | SKU of the product currently being viewed. |
| `brand_page` | `brand_name` | Name of the brand. Pair with `sponsored_brand` placements when applicable. |
| `digital_signage` | `device_id`, `store_name` | Use `digital_signage` placements and the `app` channel. |

parameters.name: publisher_id
parameters.description: Publisher identifier provided by your account manager

session_id.description: Persistent visitor identifier (at least 14 days). Must contain only alphanumeric characters.

user_id.description: Unique identifier for the user. Must contain only alphanumeric characters.

store_id.description: Filters ads based on the store's inventory. If not provided, ads with any available inventory will be returned.

context.description: Context where the ad will be displayed.

term.description: Search terms used for product searches. Required only in search context.

category_name.description: Name of the category used for targeting. Always provide the full breadcrumb path of the current category. Required only in category context.

product_sku.description: SKU ID used for targeting. Required only in product context.

brand_name.description: Name of the brand to filter products by. Required only in brand context.

placements.description: Placements are used to query multiple ads for different site regions with their own configurations.

quantity.description: Number of ads to be returned.

size.description: Expected ad size. Important when a region has a predefined size and requires a media asset fitting that size. For images: `desktop` or `mobile`. For videos: `1080p`, `720p`, `480p`, `360p`, or `320p`. Required only when types include `banner` or `sponsored_brand`.

types.description: Types of ads that can be returned in this request.

assets_type.description: Accepted media types. Only valid for `banner` and `sponsored_brand` types. Default: `["image"]`.

allow_sku_duplications.description: Allows the same SKU ads to appear multiple times in the same placement. Default=false.

product_attributes.description: Additional product information. Used when catalog data is incomplete and these details need to be sent during ad queries.

channel.description: Indicates the device type accessing the ad.

device_id.description: Unique device ID (screen, totem). Required only in digital_signage context.

store_name.description: Name of the store where the device is located. Required only in digital_signage context.

brand.description: Publisher's site name. Required when the publisher has multiple sites.

userAgent.description: Client environment identification (body field, not the HTTP User-Agent header). Provides meta-information about the client environment accessing the ad.

tags.description: Tags to contextualize searches (primarily for search context). Filters ads that contain at least one of the requested tags. Max 10 per SKU, 64 chars per tag. Only works with product campaigns.

skus.description: SKU filter for querying sponsored products. Note: Only sponsored product campaigns respect this filter.

dedup_campaign_ads.description: Specifies whether results should be deduplicated by campaign, so at most one ad per campaign is returned. Default=false.

dedup_ads.description: Specifies whether results should deduplicate ads across multiple placements (use only when querying multiple placements simultaneously). Default=false.

segmentation.description: Allows campaign segmentation based on user information.

additionalProperties.description: List of ads for a specific placement.

media_url.description: URL of the image or video to be displayed. Present for banner, sponsored_brand, and digital_signage ad types.

click_url.description: URL of the click event beacon for the ad.

impression_url.description: URL of the impression event beacon for the ad.

view_url.description: URL of the view event beacon for the ad.

product_sku.description: Product identifier. Present when ad type is 'product'.

products.description: Array of products associated with the sponsored brand. Present when ad type is 'sponsored_brand'.

items.description: Product associated with the sponsored brand.

duration.description: Duration of the ad display in seconds. Present when ad type is 'digital_signage'.

429.description:
Too Many Requests

Rate limit exceeded.

get.description:
Retrieves information from all advertisers associated with a publisher account. The data is returned in JSON format by default, but can be exported as an XLSX file by setting `download=true`.

>ℹ️ Only available in the publisher view (publisher account).

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

pages.description: Total number of pages for pagination.

metrics.description: Performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

total_conversions_items_quantity.description: Total quantity of items across all ad-driven conversions. Sums the quantities of every item in each conversion event (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 2).

conversions_quantity.description: Total number of ad-driven conversions (sales attributed to an ad). Counts each conversion event as 1, regardless of how many items were purchased (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 1).

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

get.description:
Retrieves information about the publishers associated with an advertiser account. The data is returned in JSON format by default, but can be exported as an XLSX file by setting `download=true`.

>ℹ️ Only available in the advertiser view (advertiser account).

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

pages.description: Total number of pages for pagination.

metrics.description: Performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

total_conversions_items_quantity.description: Total quantity of items across all ad-driven conversions. Sums the quantities of every item in each conversion event (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 2).

conversions_quantity.description: Total number of ad-driven conversions (sales attributed to an ad). Counts each conversion event as 1, regardless of how many items were purchased (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 1).

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

get.description:
Retrieves information about publishers associated with a Network Publisher account. The data is returned in JSON format by default, but can be exported as an XLSX file by setting `download=true`.

>ℹ️ Only publishers operating in the Network format are allowed to access this report.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

total.description: Total number of network publishers available.

pages.description: Total number of pages for pagination.

metrics.description: Performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

total_conversions_items_quantity.description: Total quantity of items across all ad-driven conversions. Sums the quantities of every item in each conversion event (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 2).

conversions_quantity.description: Total number of ad-driven conversions (sales attributed to an ad). Counts each conversion event as 1, regardless of how many items were purchased (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 1).

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

get.description:
Fetches all available campaigns, applying filters as needed. The data is returned in JSON format by default, but can be exported as an XLSX file by setting `download=true`.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

pages.description: Total number of pages for pagination.

settings.description: Campaign settings object. The fields are dynamic and may vary depending on the campaign type.

start_at.description: Campaign start date in ISO 8601 format.

end_at.description: Campaign end date in ISO 8601 format.

disabled_at.description: Campaign disabled date in ISO 8601 format.

created_at.description: Campaign creation date in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Campaign last update date in ISO 8601 format.

deleted_at.description: Campaign deletion date in ISO 8601 format.

pending.description: Pending operations awaiting review for this campaign/ad. Empty when there is nothing pending.

items.description: Pending operation entry, grouping a `label` with its `quantity`.

label.description: Type of pending operation. Currently, only `ads` is returned, indicating ads awaiting review.

quantity.description: Number of pending items of the given `label`.

metrics.description: Performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

get.description:
Retrieves detailed information about a campaign, such as the products associated with the campaign, status history, ads, and metrics. The data is returned only in JSON format.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the campaign to fetch.

settings.description: Campaign settings object. The fields are dynamic and may vary depending on the campaign type.

start_at.description: Campaign start date in ISO 8601 format.

end_at.description: Campaign end date in ISO 8601 format.

created_at.description: Campaign creation date in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Campaign last update date in ISO 8601 format.

deleted_at.description: Campaign deletion date in ISO 8601 format.

pending.description: Pending operations awaiting review for this campaign/ad. Empty when there is nothing pending.

items.description: Pending operation entry, grouping a `label` with its `quantity`.

label.description: Type of pending operation. Currently, only `ads` is returned, indicating ads awaiting review.

quantity.description: Number of pending items of the given `label`.

metrics.description: Performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

ads.description: Array of ad objects associated with the campaign.

settings.description: Ad-specific settings object. The fields are dynamic and may vary depending on the ad type.

media_url.description: URL of the ad media asset.

disabled_at.description: Ad disabled date in ISO 8601 format.

created_at.description: Ad creation date in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Ad last update date in ISO 8601 format.

deleted_at.description: Ad deletion date in ISO 8601 format.

is_running.description: Whether the ad is currently running.

campaign_settings.description: Associated campaign settings. The fields are dynamic and may vary depending on the campaign type.

metrics.description: Ad-specific performance metrics. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

products.description: Array of products associated with the campaign.

created_at.description: Status change date in ISO 8601 format.

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

get.description:
Exports a mixed campaign report for advertiser accounts, including both regular campaigns and subpublisher information for network campaigns. The data is returned in JSON format by default, but can be exported as an XLSX file by setting `download=true`.

>ℹ️ This route is intended for advertiser accounts. For non white-label accounts, only non-private publisher rows are returned.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

parameters.name: sub_publisher_id
parameters.description: Filters network rows by subpublisher ID.

parameters.name: sub_publisher_name
parameters.description: Filters network rows by subpublisher name.

pages.description: Total number of pages for pagination.

sub_publisher_id.description: Subpublisher identifier (only present for network campaigns).

sub_publisher_name.description: Subpublisher name (only present for network campaigns).

pending.description: Pending operations awaiting review for this campaign/ad. Empty when there is nothing pending.

items.description: Pending operation entry, grouping a `label` with its `quantity`.

label.description: Type of pending operation. Currently, only `ads` is returned, indicating ads awaiting review.

quantity.description: Number of pending items of the given `label`.

metrics.description: Performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

get.description:
Exports a detailed ad report for advertiser accounts, including subpublisher breakdown for network campaigns. The data is returned in JSON format by default, but can be exported as an XLSX file by setting `download=true`.

>ℹ️ This route is intended for advertiser accounts. Non-network campaigns return one row per ad, while network campaigns return one row per `ad + subpublisher`. For non white-label accounts, only non-private publisher rows are returned.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

parameters.name: advertiser_id
parameters.description: Filters ads by advertiser ID. In the BFF flow, this value is derived from the authenticated advertiser context.

parameters.name: sub_publisher_id
parameters.description: Filters network rows by subpublisher ID.

parameters.name: sub_publisher_name
parameters.description: Filters network rows by subpublisher name.

parameters.name: hide_pending_rejected
parameters.description: If `true`, excludes `pending_review` and `rejected` rows when `ad_status` is not provided.

pages.description: Total number of pages for pagination.

sub_publisher_id.description: Subpublisher identifier (only present for network campaigns).

sub_publisher_name.description: Subpublisher name (only present for network campaigns).

sub_publisher_account_id.description: Subpublisher account identifier (only present for network campaigns).

metrics.description: Ad performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

total_conversions_items_quantity.description: Total quantity of items across all ad-driven conversions. Sums the quantities of every item in each conversion event (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 2).

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

get.description:
Fetches all available ads, applying filters as needed. The data is returned in JSON format by default, but can be exported as an XLSX file by setting `download=true`.

>ℹ️ Paused ads are excluded from the default response. To include paused ads, set `show_inactive=true`.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

pages.description: Total number of pages for pagination.

settings.description: Ad-specific settings object. The fields are dynamic and may vary depending on the ad type.

disabled_at.description: Ad disabled date in ISO 8601 format.

created_at.description: Ad creation date in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Ad last update date in ISO 8601 format.

deleted_at.description: Ad deletion date in ISO 8601 format.

campaign_settings.description: Associated campaign settings. The fields are dynamic and may vary depending on the campaign type.

is_running.description: Whether the ad is currently running.

pending.description: Pending operations awaiting review for this campaign/ad. Empty when there is nothing pending.

items.description: Pending operation entry, grouping a `label` with its `quantity`.

label.description: Type of pending operation. Currently, only `ads` is returned, indicating ads awaiting review.

quantity.description: Number of pending items of the given `label`.

metrics.description: Ad performance metrics object. All metric values are returned as strings regardless of their numeric nature.

total_conversions_items_quantity.description: Total quantity of items across all ad-driven conversions. Sums the quantities of every item in each conversion event (for example, if a shopper buys two units of a product after clicking an ad, this metric increases by 2).

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

post.description:
Notifies VTEX Ads about the final status of a credit transfer that was previously requested by VTEX Ads to the marketplace's `POST /checking_account/transfer` endpoint. The marketplace must call this webhook with the resolved status of each transfer transaction.

>⚠️ In case of a webhook call failure, the marketplace must retry until a `204 No Content` response is received.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

parameters.name: publisher_id
parameters.description: Publisher identifier provided by your account manager.

transaction_id.description: Identifier of the transfer transaction returned by the marketplace when the transfer was requested.

message.description: Description of the failure reason. Required when `status` is `failure`.

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

post.description:
Generates a redirect URL that allows a seller user to access the VTEX Ads platform without needing to log in again. Use this endpoint to enable a unified login experience for marketplace sellers.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [License Manager resources](https://help.vtex.com/docs/tutorials/license-manager-resources).

sso_token.description: User identification token generated by the marketplace.

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user in the marketplace.

redirect_url.description: Redirect URL the seller user must follow to access the VTEX Ads platform.

401.description:
Unauthorized

Missing or invalid authentication credentials.

X-Secret-Key.name: X-Secret-Key
X-Secret-Key.description: Secret key paired with `X-Api-Key` for authenticating webhook calls.

Content-Type.name: Content-Type
Content-Type.description: Type of the content being sent.

Accept.name: Accept
Accept.description: HTTP Client Negotiation Accept Header. Indicates the types of responses the client can understand.

StartDate.name: start_date
StartDate.description: Start date for metrics in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

EndDate.name: end_date
EndDate.description: End date for metrics in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

Quantity.name: quantity
Quantity.description: Number of items per page. When `download=true`, the BFF requests up to `20000` rows for XLSX generation.

Count.name: count
Count.description: If `true`, returns the total number of available records.

AccountInfo.name: account_info
AccountInfo.description: If `true`, includes detailed account information in the result.

Download.name: download
Download.description: If `true`, returns an XLSX file buffer for download instead of JSON.
